items.text: Notice: The elevator in Anderson Hall will be out of service from March 3 to March 7 for maintenance. Please use the stairs located in the north stairwell. A $5 fee will be charged for using the freight elevator during this period. Contact Facilities Office for questions.

questions.stem: According to the notice, what is required for using the freight elevator during the maintenance period?

options.A: A signed permission form from the Facilities Office
options.B: A reservation made at least one day in advance
options.C: A valid student identification card for access
options.D: A payment of a five-dollar usage fee

questions.explanation: The notice states that a $5 fee will be charged for using the freight elevator during this period.

questions.stem: What alternative is provided for moving between floors while the elevator is unavailable?

options.A: The freight elevator in the south stairwell
options.B: The stairs in the north stairwell
options.C: The elevator in the adjacent building
options.D: The escalator on the main floor

questions.explanation: The notice directs people to use the stairs located in the north stairwell.

items.text: Hi Jamie, Thank you for confirming your participation in our research study on campus dining habits. Your session is scheduled for this Friday at 2:00 PM in Room 204. You will receive $15 in cash upon completion. Please arrive 10 minutes early. Best, Dr. Park

questions.stem: What is the participant asked to do before the session begins?

options.A: Arrive ten minutes prior to the scheduled time
options.B: Bring a valid university identification card
options.C: Submit a signed consent form in advance
options.D: Complete a short online survey beforehand

questions.explanation: The email instructs the recipient to arrive 10 minutes early.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the compensation for the study?

options.A: It is provided only after a follow-up meeting
options.B: It is paid through a direct bank transfer
options.C: It is given in cash at the end of the session
options.D: It is reduced if the participant arrives late

questions.explanation: The email states that the participant will receive $15 in cash upon completion, implying payment is in cash at session end.
